steps.title: Spot the vertex form
steps.content: $f(x) = (x-1)^2 + 7$ is vertex form $a(x-h)^2 + k$ with $a = 1 > 0$, so the parabola opens upward and the vertex is a minimum.

steps.title: Read $k$ directly — that is the minimum value
steps.content: The minimum equals $k = 7$. No solving needed. That matches choice C — C is correct.
